synopsis: Westminster Presbytery was found to have erred in its BCO 31-2 investigation of secret taping by TE Frank Smith by failing to obtain full witness testimony and investigate legal ramifications; case remanded. The court found no proof of partiality and declined to require establishment of unbiblical criteria for secret taping. Vote: 18 concurring, 1 dissenting (RE Frederick Neikirk), 2 recused, 1 abstained, 2 absent.
